"cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:N/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-15", "name": "External Control of System or Configuration Setting"}], "description": "## Summary

Workspace .env could inject OpenClaw runtime-control variables.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw`
- Ecosystem: npm
- Affected versions: `< 2026.4.9`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.9`

## Impact

A malicious workspace `.env` file could set OpenClaw runtime-control variables affecting update sources, gateway URLs, ClawHub resolution, browser executable paths, and related behavior.

## Technical Details

The fix blocks OpenClaw runtime-control keys and key families from workspace `.env` loading.

## Fix

The issue was fixed in #62660. The first stable tag containing the fix is `v2026.4.9`, and `openclaw@2026.4.14` includes the fix.

## Fix Commit(s)

- `dbfcef319618158fa40b31cdac386ea34c392c0c`
- PR: #62660

## Release Process Note

Users should upgrade to `openclaw` 2026.4.9 or newer. The latest npm release, `2026.4.14`, already includes the fix.

## Credits

Thanks to @zsxsoft, with sponsorship from @KeenSecurityLab for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00203, "percentile": 0.10179}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7wv4-cc7p-jhxc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-17T21:56:12Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7wv4-cc7p-jhxc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7wv4-cc7p-jhxc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-43531"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-05T12:16:19Z", "published_at": "2026-04-17T21:56:12Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-7wv4-cc7p-jhxc", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/62660", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/dbfcef319618158fa40b31cdac386ea34c392c0c", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-43531", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-environment-variable-injection-via-workspace-env-file", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7wv4-cc7p-jhxc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-7wv4-cc7p-jhxc", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Workspace .env could inject OpenClaw runtime-control variables", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T21:48:04Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7wv4-cc7p-jhxc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.9", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.9"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
